metadata.title: Kavio all motions promo demo
metadata.purpose: Vertical self-promo demo covering native transitions, camera helpers, text motion, masks, timing, and cinematic recipes.

layers.text: Native transitions, text motion, camera movement, masks, timing, and cinematic recipes in one vertical promo.
Track-aware transitions keep clips timed without visual collisions.
Author transitions, masks, camera moves, text motion, and render-ready exports as data.
